zh.Wraxall, North Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特福拉薩爾
zh.Charlbury, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾哈爾波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Clayton於1535年出生在英國賀特福爾時，她的父親William de Clayton35歲，母親Eleanor Chetwode28歲。她於1557年與William Harmon在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福拉薩爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1588年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.Wraxall, North Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特福拉薩爾
zh-hans.Charlbury, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾哈爾波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Clayton于1535年出生在英国賀特福爾时，她的父亲William de Clayton35岁，母亲Eleanor Chetwode28岁。她于1557年与William Harmon在英国英格兰薩默塞特福拉薩爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1588年在英国英格兰賀特福爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Clayton was born in 1535, in Hertfordshire, England, her father, William de Clayton, was 35 and her mother, Eleanor Chetwode, was 28. She married William Harmon in 1557, in Wraxall, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1588, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Clayton est née en 1535, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Clayton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Chetwode, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Harmon en 1557, à Wraxall, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1588, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Clayton 1535 in Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Clayton 35 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Chetwode 28. Sie hat 1557 in Wraxall, Somerset, England, United Kingdom William Harmon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1588 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Clayton è nata il nel 1535 nel Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, William de Clayton, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Chetwode, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William Harmon nel 1557, nel Wraxall, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1588, nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Claytonが1535年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Claytonは35歳，母Eleanor Chetwodeは28歳であった。1557年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウラクサルでWilliam Harmonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1588年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Clayton(이)가 1535년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Clayton(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Chetwode(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1557년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 라스알에서 William Harmon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1588년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Clayton nasceu em 1535, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Clayton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Chetwode, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William Harmon em 1557, em Wraxall, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1588, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Clayton родилась в 1535 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Clayton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Chetwode, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Harmon в 1557 г. в местности раксалл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1588 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Clayton nació en 1535, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Clayton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Eleanor Chetwode, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William Harmon en 1557, en Wraxall, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1588, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
